_doc: Human-maintained escape hatch (ROADMAP §2.5.5). symbolOverrides: fix wrong tickers found in sources, applied right after scraping. companyOverrides: fill/correct fields on the final record, keyed by company id; every entry needs a _why.

ROP.SW._why: Wikipedia's SMI table lists Roche as 'ROP' (a typo; SIX ticker is ROG), and Yahoo only carries the bearer share as RO.SW — ROG.SW does not resolve there.

fiserv._why: Yahoo assetProfile omits country for FISV; HQ is Milwaukee, Wisconsin.

alliance-witan._why: FTSE 100 investment trust; Yahoo has no assetProfile sector/country for closed-end funds.

f-and-c-investment-trust._why: FTSE 100 investment trust; Yahoo has no assetProfile sector/country for closed-end funds.

polar-capital-technology-trust._why: FTSE 100 investment trust; Yahoo has no assetProfile sector/country for closed-end funds.

scottish-mortgage-investment-trust._why: FTSE 100 investment trust; Yahoo has no assetProfile sector/country for closed-end funds.

tritax-big-box-reit._why: FTSE 100 REIT; Yahoo has no assetProfile sector/country for it.

michelin._why: Yahoo assetProfile for ML.PA has sector but omits country; HQ is Clermont-Ferrand, France.
